# Daniel Valkanov — Bioinformatics Consultant

> Independent bioinformatics consultant helping research teams and laboratories
> extract reliable, reproducible results from their NGS and omics data — without
> hiring an in-house bioinformatician. A rare combination of molecular biology and
> software engineering: analysis you can reproduce and defend.

## Services
- 16S/ITS metagenomic analysis + publication-ready, interpretable report
- Secondary NGS analysis (WES / targeted panels) + clinically interpretable report with ACMG classification (technical analysis only — not a medical diagnosis)
- Reproducible pipelines (Nextflow / Snakemake, Docker / Singularity)

## Who it is for
Agricultural institutes, veterinary and food laboratories, academic groups, and
small or new genetic laboratories without an in-house bioinformatician.

- Home (English): https://dnv-bio-tech.netlify.app/
- Services: https://dnv-bio-tech.netlify.app/services/

- Blog: https://dnv-bio-tech.netlify.app/blog/
- Contact: https://dnv-bio-tech.netlify.app/contact/

## Languages
- English (default): site root, e.g. /services/
- Bulgarian: /bg/ prefix, e.g. /bg/services/

## Notes
- Pricing is individual per project scope; a free initial consultation is offered.
- Confidentiality: NDA on request, isolated environment, GDPR-compliant, data not used to train AI models.
- Update the domain in this file once a custom domain is purchased.
